response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Audio matches 'Utauyo!! MIRACLE' lyrics in the Reference JSON (intro, bridge, final chorus, and outro). 2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized for musical segments; manual transcription for the English talk segment. 3. Timing & Pacing: Anchored to vocal bursts with aggressive end-time truncation for fast lyrics. Instantaneous transitions applied to maintain synchronization.

subtitles.original: みんながだいすき!!
subtitles.english: I love you all!!

subtitles.original: えねんぞっこうるらら miracle sing time
subtitles.english: It’s our never-ending lu-la-la Miracle Sing Time

subtitles.original: うたってうたってあいつたえるさいきょうしゅだん
subtitles.english: I’ll sing, I’ll sing, it’s the absolute best way to express my love!

subtitles.original: つたないきょくでもびみょうなかしでも
subtitles.english: Even if the composition is clumsy or the lyrics are iffy

subtitles.original: とどけたいせいぱいのsoulを
subtitles.english: I want to convey my soul with all I have!

subtitles.original: どんなほんもかいてないじゅぎょうじゃちょっとおそわんない
subtitles.english: It’s not written in any book or taught even a bit in class

subtitles.original: けどいっしょうわすれない
subtitles.english: But I'll never forget it for the rest of my life

subtitles.original: このよにないとおもってたきせきいっしょにねうたえば
subtitles.english: If we sing together this miracle I thought didn't exist in this world

subtitles.original: しんじられるんだつよくなれるんだ
subtitles.english: I can believe, I can become strong

subtitles.original: みんながだいすき
subtitles.english: I love you all!!

subtitles.original: えねんぞっこうるらら miracle sing time
subtitles.english: It’s our never-ending lu-la-la Miracle Sing Time

subtitles.original: うたってうたってあいつたえるさいきょうしゅだん
subtitles.english: I’ll sing, I’ll sing, it’s the absolute best way to express my love!

subtitles.original: つたないきょくでもびみょうなかしでも
subtitles.english: Even if the composition is clumsy or the lyrics are iffy

subtitles.original: とどけらいせいぱいのsoulとうしんだいのlifeを
subtitles.english: I want to convey my soul and my life as it is!

subtitles.original: きょうはきのうみたい？あしたはきょうみたい
subtitles.english: Is today like yesterday? Is tomorrow like today?

subtitles.original: だいじょうぶだいじょうぶたのしかったらだいせいかい
subtitles.english: It’s okay, it’s okay, if it was fun then it’s a great success!

subtitles.original: ろっかーはいつだってね「いま」やんちゃさかり
subtitles.english: Lockers are always full of mischief "now"

subtitles.original: すすめおとめだきしめて、きぼうを
subtitles.english: Go forth, fair maidens, and embrace hope!

subtitles.original: だいすきだいすきだいすきをありがとう
subtitles.english: Thank you for all the love, love, love!

subtitles.original: うたうようたうよこころこめてきょうもうたうよ
subtitles.english: I’ll sing, I’ll sing, I’ll sing today as well with all my heart!

subtitles.original: だいすきだいすきだいすきをありがとう
subtitles.english: Thank you for all the love, love, love!

subtitles.original: うたうようたうよあいをこめてずっとうたうよ
subtitles.english: I’ll sing, I’ll sing, I’ll always sing with all my love!
